reference: I have a hard, pea-sized red lump on my right side above the collarbone. I thought it was a insect bite. It has been there since the middle of July. I thought I would leave it, thinking it would go away, but it has not. It has gotten a bit bigger, it hurts when you touch it, and it hurts around the collarbone and the side of my neck.
text: I have a hard, pea-sized red lump on my right side above the collarbone. I thought it was an insect bite, because it's been there since the middle of July. I thought I would leave it, thinking it would go away, but it has not. It has gotten a bit bigger. I touch it and it hurts around the collarbone and the side of my neck.
